title: Festival Barometer 2020
description: The festival barometer aims to collect information on Finnish festival visitors and the changes that occur in their taste in music and festivals over the years. In 2020, questions related to the COVID-19 pandemic were also included. The data includes three open-ended questions, with answers that are also suitable for qualitative analysis. LiveFIN ry, Lapland Institute for Tourism Research, the Sibelius Academy at the University of the Arts and the participating festivals were involved in the imp
